This causes blood sugar to get too high. Insulin is a hormone that helps control blood sugar.

If you have diabetes, you may be at risk for developing a condition called diabetic ketoacidosis.

Diabetic ketoacidosis is a condition in which the body's cells become unable to use insulin properly.

It can lead to serious complications, including:

High blood pressure

Heart failure

Kidney failure

Seizures

If you have diabetes, you should talk to your doctor about taking insulin.

If you have any questions, please call the Diabetes Help Desk at (713) 853-4777.
